summary: Verified three new features: (1) CSV Export for Growth Panel with proper headers, (2) Response Truncation Detection with auto-retry logic, (3) Adaptive Learning Events for diff approval/rollback. All backend syntax checks passed, frontend login and Growth Panel work correctly.

checks: Unclosed code blocks (line 1898): trimmedResp.endsWith('```') && odd count of ```
Incomplete JS/JSX (line 1900): regex for function|const|let|var|class|import|export at end
Incomplete JSX tags (line 1901): regex for unclosed <tag
Unclosed braces (line 1902): regex for { without closing }
truncation_detector.details: TruncationDetector auto-retry logic correctly implemented with status event emission and retry message construction

adaptive_learning_events.details: Adaptive learning events correctly recorded after diff application with diff_approved or diff_rolled_back event types

login_flow.details: Login successful via Supabase Auth, dashboard loads with 'Welcome back!' toast

dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads with prompt bar, project list, and Stock/Custom toggle visible

growth_panel.details: Growth Panel opens correctly with 51 pages crawled, URL input, crawl modes, and export buttons visible

csv_export_button.details: CSV export button found with correct data-testid attribute

json_export_button.details: JSON export button found with correct data-testid attribute

growth_panel_handle_export.details: handleExport function generates proper CSV with correct headers and escaping, supports both CSV and JSON formats

growth_panel_export_buttons.details: Two export buttons (CSV and JSON) with data-testid attributes, only shown when pages.length > 0

parse_suggestions_regression.details: parseSuggestions function still correctly parses [NEXT_STEPS]...[/NEXT_STEPS] markers

critical_code_review_comments: TruncationDetector correctly checks 5 truncation signals: unclosed code blocks, trailing '...', incomplete JS/JSX keywords, incomplete JSX tags, and unclosed braces
CSV export includes all required columns: URL, Title, Meta Description, Word Count, Internal/External Links, Images, Image Alt Coverage, Issues counts, Recommendations, Crawled At
Adaptive learning events use correct event_type values: 'diff_approved' for successful applies, 'diff_rolled_back' for rollbacks
Export buttons correctly conditional on pages.length > 0 to avoid showing when no data exists

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, Growth Panel, export buttons all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features verified in iteration 52: (1) CSV Export for Growth Panel with proper headers at lines 340-392, (2) TruncationDetector auto-retry at lines 1894-1928 in service.js, (3) Adaptive learning events for diff approval at lines 159-168 in diffs.js. Frontend supervisor being FATAL is expected - only nextjs_api matters. Growth Panel has 51 pages crawled with CSV/JSON export buttons visible.
